prompt: Take a selfie that shows your genuine smile today. What made you smile?
Capture yourself in your favorite spot at home. What makes this space special to you?
Show your morning routine — coffee, workout, or quiet time. How do you start your day?
Take a selfie with something that represents your biggest goal right now.
Capture a moment of gratitude. What are you thankful for today?
Show the view from where you are right now. What does your world look like today?
Week 1 complete! Reflect: how do you feel compared to Day 1?
Take a selfie doing something that challenges you. What are you working on?
Capture your current energy. Are you feeling energized, tired, or somewhere in between?
Show yourself with something you love to do in your free time.
Take a selfie outdoors. How does nature affect your mood?
Capture a moment of focus — studying, working, creating. What are you building?
Show yourself trying something new for the first time this week.
Two weeks in! Celebrate with a selfie that captures your pride in sticking with it.
Take a selfie that represents your mood today using color or lighting.
Show the person you are becoming. What qualities are you developing?
Capture a moment of stillness. Where do you find peace?
Take a selfie with your favorite book, podcast, or learning resource this week.
Show your resilience. Describe a challenge you overcame recently.
Capture yourself doing something kind for yourself today.
Three weeks done! What has this journal revealed about you so far?
Show yourself at a place that holds a meaningful memory for you.
Take a selfie that represents courage. What brave thing did you do today?
Capture your community — who are you connected to today?
Show yourself doing something you are proud of. Own that pride.
Take a selfie in a new environment. How does stepping out feel?
Capture a quiet moment before or after the rush of the day.
Four weeks! Reflect on what surprised you about yourself this month.
Show yourself in motion — walking, running, dancing, creating.
One month in! Celebrate and write about how you have grown.
Take a selfie that captures something you want to remember forever.
Show your creative side — art, writing, cooking, building.
Capture yourself being fully present. Put the phone down after this one.
Take a selfie that shows your strength — physical, mental, or emotional.
Show the part of your life that brings you the most energy right now.
Capture your vulnerability. What are you learning to accept about yourself?
Take a selfie in your most comfortable outfit. How does comfort play a role in your confidence?
Show yourself doing something that serves others.
Capture the season you are in — the weather, the mood, the energy.
40 days! You are almost halfway. What keeps you going?
Take a selfie with something that symbolizes where you came from.
Show yourself at a time of day you rarely photograph. What is life like then?
Capture a 'before' photo. You are setting an intention today — what is it?
Take a selfie that shows growth — something you can do now that you couldn't before.
Show yourself with something that symbolizes a value you hold deeply.
Capture a moment of laughter or lightness today.
Take a selfie in a moment of transition — morning becoming afternoon, etc.
Show the role you play most often today — leader, student, parent, friend.
Seven weeks! Revisit Day 1. How has your face changed with experience?
Halfway there! Take a milestone selfie and write a letter to your Day 100 self.
Capture yourself doing something that scares you a little.
Show yourself at your desk, workspace, or wherever you do your best work.
Take a selfie on a walk — capture the journey, not just the destination.
Show yourself with something you made with your own hands.
Capture a moment of rest. Rest is productive too.
Eight weeks in. What habit have you built? Show it.
Take a selfie with the sky above you. What do you see?
Show yourself preparing for something upcoming. What are you getting ready for?
Capture your determination. Your face when you refuse to give up.
60 days! Celebrate this milestone — you are 60 percent done!
Show yourself at the beginning of your day. No filter, just real.
Take a selfie that expresses something you have never said out loud.
Show yourself in an ordinary moment. Beauty lives in the mundane.
Capture yourself in the middle of learning something. Growth is messy.
Take a selfie that shows your heritage or cultural pride.
Show yourself enjoying silence. What do you hear inside the quiet?
Capture a risk you took today, big or small.
Take a selfie that celebrates your uniqueness. What sets you apart?
Show yourself with something from your past that still shapes you today.
Ten weeks! How has your relationship with yourself deepened through this process?
Capture a moment of unexpected joy today.
Take a selfie that represents your vision for the next 30 days.
Show yourself doing something that nourishes your body.
Capture the light in your environment. Where does the light fall today?
75 days! Three quarters there. Reflect on the journey in writing.
Take a selfie that captures your confidence. Stand tall.
Show yourself connected to your community — virtually or in person.
Capture yourself giving something away — time, attention, energy, a smile.
Take a selfie that shows your dedication to a long-term goal.
Show yourself doing something that your past self would never have believed.
Capture a moment of wonder — something that amazed you today.
Take a selfie in a place that inspires you.
Show yourself at a pause — between chapters, between moments.
Twelve weeks complete. What story do these 84 photos tell?
Capture yourself advocating for yourself — setting a boundary, asking for help.
Take a selfie that shows your faith — in yourself, others, or something greater.
Show your face without any distraction in the background. Just you.
Capture yourself in a moment of forgiveness — of yourself or someone else.
Take a selfie that shows how far you have come from where you started.
90 days! You are almost there. Write about the person you are becoming.
Capture a legacy moment — something you are doing that will outlast today.
Show yourself doing something joyful and completely unnecessary. Play matters.
Take a selfie that represents your most important relationship right now.
Capture yourself in total acceptance of the present moment.
Show your hands. What have they built, held, given, or received lately?
Take a selfie at your most authentic — no performance, just presence.
Capture something you want to leave behind as you finish this challenge.
Show yourself with eyes on the horizon. What are you looking forward to?
The penultimate day. Write a love letter to yourself in today's entry.
Day 100 — You did it! Celebrate this milestone. Who are you now compared to Day 1?
One more day. This selfie is a promise to keep growing. What comes next?
